content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_Rebates
-- drop view v_Rebates
as
SELECT      A.*, B.Region, [Ship to State], [Ship to City], [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM
(
SELECT          [Sales Type] as             [Invoice Type]
,               CS3.TX40 AS                  [Buying Group]
,                                           [Customer ID]
,                                           [Customer Name]
,              ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) AS [External Rep ID]
,               CS.TX40 AS                  [External Rep Name]
,               OC.RESP AS                  [Sales Manager]
,               [Order ID] AS               [Sales Order]
,                                           [Customer PO]
,               [Invoice ID] AS             [Invoice Number]
,               [Date] AS                   [Invoice Date]
,               [Part ID - Actual] AS       [Item Number]
,               [Sales Qty] AS              [Inv Qty]
,               [Net Sales Amt] AS          [Inv Amt]
,               OH.ORTP as                  [Order Type]
,               OH.TEDL as                  [Freight Terms]
,               RIGHT(OH.ADID,4) as         [Address ID]
,               CASE WHEN OC.SDST = 'EXL' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.18
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'NIS' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.18
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'SF1' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.05
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'SF2' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.12
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'SF3' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.00
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'PRI' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.15
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'NAF' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.08
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'TRI' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.06
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'EDD' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.15
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'RD1' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.12
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'IFE' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.14
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM03002' THEN 0.15
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM02448' THEN 0.09
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM02415' THEN 0.10
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM01843' THEN 0.03
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM02943' THEN 0.15
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM02596' THEN 0.02
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM02112' THEN 0.05
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM03589' THEN 0.05
                WHEN [Customer ID] IN ('COM02872', 'COM02878', 'COM02875', 'COM02876', 'COM02873') THEN 0.07
                ELSE 0 END AS [Rebate Rate]
,               CASE WHEN OC.SDST = 'EXL' THEN 0.05
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'NIS' THEN 0.05
                WHEN OC.SDST IN ('SF1', 'SF2', 'SF3', 'RD1', 'RD2') THEN 0.02
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'PRI' THEN 0.01
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'NAF' THEN 0.06
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'IFE' THEN 0.02
                ELSE 0 END AS [Admin Fee Rate]
FROM            a_SalesData SD
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] = MM.ITNO
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH ON SD.[Order ID] = OH.ORNO
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON SD.[Customer ID] =  OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSMCDX AS CX ON OC.CFC9 = CX.OBV1 AND CX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSMCDX AS CX2 ON OC.CFC9 =CX2.OBV1 AND MM.ITCL = CX2.OBV2 AND CX2.PREX = 4 
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = CS.STKY AND cs.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB AS CS2 ON MM.ITGR = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'ITGR'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB AS CS3 ON OC.SDST = CS3.STKY AND CS3.STCO = 'SDST'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CRPDLN SC ON MM.PDLN = SC.PDLN
WHERE           [Date] >= '2024-01-01'
) A

LEFT JOIN


(
select     distinct CUNO as [Customer ID]
,           ADID as [Address ID]
,           CASE WHEN MVXD = 'COM03153' then 'East'
            WHEN MVXD = 'COM03154' THEN 'Midwest'
            WHEN MVXD = 'COM03155' THEN 'West'
            else MVXD End as Region
,           ECAR as [Ship to State]
,           TOWN as [Ship to City]
,           PONO as [Ship to Zip Code]
from        M3.OCUSAD OA
LEFT JOIN   M3.MBMTRD RE on OA.ADID = RIGHT(MBMD, 4) and IDTR = 240 and OA.CUNO = RE.MVXD 
where MVXD IN ('COM03153', 'COM03154', 'COM03155')

UNION ALL

select     distinct 'COM03156' as [Customer ID]
,           RIGHT(MBMD, 4) as [Address ID]
,           CASE WHEN MVXD = 'COM03153' then 'East'
            WHEN MVXD = 'COM03154' THEN 'Midwest'
            WHEN MVXD = 'COM03155' THEN 'West'
            else MVXD End as Region
,           ECAR as [Ship to State]
,           TOWN as [Ship to City]
,           PONO as [Ship to Zip Code]
from        M3.OCUSAD OA
LEFT JOIN   M3.MBMTRD RE on OA.ADID = RIGHT(MBMD, 4) and IDTR = 240 and OA.CUNO = RE.MVXD
where MVXD IN ('COM03153', 'COM03154', 'COM03155')
) B         ON A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] and A.[Address ID] = B.[Address ID]



/*
LEFT JOIN

(
select      CUNO as [Customer ID]
,           ADID as [Address ID]
,           ECAR as [Ship to State]
,           TOWN as [Ship to City]
,           PONO as [Ship to Zip Code]
from        M3.OCUSAD OA
WHERE       CUNO = 'COM03156'
)
*/
